org.arakhne.neteditor.io.ngr

Class NGRWriter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractNetEditorWriter
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.ngr.NGRWriter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    NetEditorWriter, NGRConstants

    public class NGRWriter
extends AbstractNetEditorWriter
implements NGRConstants
    This class permits to export the graph-model into the NGR format.

    The NGR format (or Neteditor GRaph format) is a zip archive that contains a file describing the graph in XML format and any additional data pointed by the XML file.

    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    GXLWriter, GraphMLWriter, GMLWriter
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      • getContentType

        public NetEditorContentType getContentType()
        Replies the type of the content that will be written by this NGRWriter.
        Returns:
        the type, never null.
        Since:

        Since:

      • write

        public void write(OutputStream outputStream,
         Graph<?,?,?,?> graph)
           throws IOException
        Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, but not the view objects.
        Specified by:
        write in interface NetEditorWriter
        Parameters:
        outputStream - is the stream to write in.
        graph - is the graph to export in the stream.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        public <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> void write(OutputStream outputStream,
                                    G graph,
                                    ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
           throws IOException
        Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, and the view objects stored in the given container.
        Specified by:
        write in interface NetEditorWriter
        Parameters:
        outputStream - is the stream to write in.
        graph - is the graph to export in the stream.
        container - is the figure container from which figures may be extracted.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        public void write(OutputStream outputStream,
         Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
           throws IOException
        Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, and the view objects stored in the given container.
        Specified by:
        write in interface NetEditorWriter
        Parameters:
        outputStream - is the stream to write in.
        figures - are the figures to output, and linked to the graph to output. The list is sorted from the front layer to the background layer.
        Throws:
        IOException
